calendar.matters:
Petition To Establish Ownership Of Bank Accounts
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross for Alan Carter.

The Court stated that this is a Heggstad petition regarding various bank accounts, that the petitioner is no longer asking if account ending in 3158 is in the trust, that there are only 3 other accounts, that the court has not problem with this and that no objections have been received. The Court granted the petition to establish ownership of bank accounts (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

Petition To Establish Ownership Of Bank Accounts
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Continued To Mar-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Establish Ownership Of Bank Accounts
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Continued To Mar-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Establish Ownership Of Bank Accounts
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Continued To Feb-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Establish Ownership Of Bank Accounts
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Continued To Jan-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Establish Ownership Of Bank Accounts
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Continued To Dec-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross for Alan Carter.

The Court stated that there is a preliminary issue, that the petition requires service as required by 413.10. Mr. Gross explained how the parties were served. The Court stated that it does not have jurisdiction to proceed without proper service and that there is no leeway to ignore the service requirement. Mr. Gross stated that these people are not provided for in the trust, that they are angry and that he is hoping that the court will use its equitable powers here. The petition to establish ownership of bank accounts was continued to December 15, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proper service.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
